data.title: Visa flags rapidly escalating fraud risks as agentic commerce takes hold
data.description: The company emphasized that no single organization can address the emerging risks alone. Visa said the cross-border nature of agentic AI crime requires payment networks, financial institutions, regulators, law-enforcement agencies, and technology providers to coordinate intelligence-sharing and develop common verification standards.

data.title: Amazon's Rufus assistant adds new features for the holidays
data.description: New agentic and search capabilities will level Rufus' access to Amazon account data and histories in personalized results.

data.title: Used Ford vehicles arrive for sale on Amazon Autos
data.description: The Ford Blue Advantage program will work with Amazon, as customers pick up purchases from participating dealers.

data.title: Lowe’s leans on AI and ecommerce to drive 2026 growth
data.description: President and CEO Marvin Ellison said Lowe’s has embedded generative AI tools across customer-facing and internal digital workflows.

data.title: Ecommerce Trends: How to understand agentic commerce levels currently in use
data.description: Agentic commerce and agentic AI are still evolving, with levels of capability varying across agents and platforms.
